name: gitwarp
description: Worktree isolation, context, and task records for concurrent coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Git worktree isolation and task records for agents
interface.longDescription: Use GitWarp to scan, start, inspect, hand off, view, and finish isolated git worktree sandboxes with task dossiers for automated coding agents.
defaultPrompt: Start an isolated workspace with a GitWarp task dossier for this agent task.
Scan active GitWarp worktrees, inspect context, and read the dossier before starting parallel work.
